name: Cinnamon-Chocolate Marble Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour a 9x5x3 inch loaf pan. Prepare the cake batter according to package directions; stir in vanilla. Place about one-third of the batter into a medium bowl; stir in melted chocolate. Stir cinnamon into the remaining (plain) batter. Pour the cinnamon batter into the prepared loaf pan and spoon the chocolate batter on top. Swirl the batter with a knife. Bake at 325°F for 45 to 50 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes. Remove the cake from the pan and place it on a wire rack; cool completely.
2. In a small microwave-safe bowl, melt chocolate and butter. Microwave on medium for 3 to 4 minutes, stirring once until melted. Stir in powdered sugar, vanilla, and cinnamon. Stir in hot water until the mixture is pourable.
Drizzle with Cinnamon Chocolate Glaze.
